task_completion.description: Firefox is open and connected to the Jitsi meeting 'HR_Interview_Confidential'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser window is visible, showing the Jitsi Meet interface with the room name 'HR_Interview_Confidential' or URL ending in /HR_Interview_Confidential.

task_completion.description: Epiphany browser is open and connected to the Jitsi meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epiphany (Web) browser window is visible, showing the Jitsi Meet interface for the same meeting room.

task_completion.description: The participant in Firefox is named 'Interviewer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Firefox browser, the local participant's display name is set to 'Interviewer'.

task_completion.description: The participant in Epiphany is named 'Jane_Doe_Candidate'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Epiphany browser, the local participant's display name is set to 'Jane_Doe_Candidate'.

task_completion.description: Both participants are actively in the meeting together.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both 'Interviewer' and 'Jane_Doe_Candidate' are visible in the meeting's participant list or video grid in at least one of the browsers, proving the guest was successfully admitted.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, API scripts, or direct modifications related to Jitsi.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jitsi web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine Firefox and Epiphany browser windows rendering the Jitsi Meet web application.

integrity.description: Two distinct browsers are used as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Both Firefox and Epiphany (GNOME Web) are visibly open, rather than two tabs or windows of the same browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting room is 'HR_Interview_Confidential' at http://localhost:8080. The host in Firefox must be named 'Interviewer'. The guest in Epiphany must be named 'Jane_Doe_Candidate'. Both browsers must be open and active in the meeting.
